pageContext.name: Mickey
pageContext.description: Disney's classic 1928 black-and-white animation 'Steamboat Willie' was the introduction and launch of arguably the most famous animated character in history. Mickey Mouse has become a household name the world over and is now ready to bring some of that retro magic to fans with the release of a highly collectible Master Craft from Beast Kingdom's 'Entertainment Experience Brand'.  The MC-053 Steamboat Willie Master Craft represents the pinnacle in manufacturing techniques, with each piece fully hand-made and painted. Standing at over 32cm, the statue showcases the cheeky and fun early designs of Mickey. The joyful smile as Mickey steers his boat, as well as his tapping feet, are all on show, as though it has been brought to life.  With a numbered, collectible plaque on each base, the Steamboat Willie Master Craft is for the serious Disney collectible fan who only wants the very best!
